subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath at all times been occupied with the remembrance of the Lord of Names, and the Divine Lote-Tree hath, in every moment, been raised in the call of "Verily I am" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی در کل احیان بذکر مالک اسماء مشغول و سدره الهیه در کل اوان بندای انی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
